name: Personal Loans Colorado Springs
description_short: Pikes Peak National Bank is an independent Colorado Springs bank established in 1957, offering personalized car loans, personal loans, and traditional banking services.
description_long:
Pikes Peak National Bank was founded in 1957 by local Colorado Springs business people and remains one of the few independent banks in the region. Under current Chairman Antoun Sehnaoui's leadership since 2018, the bank has expanded its community partnerships and presence. The bank operates three physical branches (Old Colorado City, North Academy, and Stetson Hills) with approximately $30.1 million in assets and serves the Pikes Peak region.

PPNB offers personal loans for multiple purposes including vehicle financing, vacation expenses, and medical procedures. They provide car loans with a stated focus on personalized and quick processing. Beyond loans, they offer personal banking accounts (Independence, Command, and Universal Personal Accounts), debit card options, online services, check ordering, and credit card applications. Their lending approach emphasizes customization to individual customer needs rather than standardized products.

The bank distinguishes itself through genuine community banking philosophy, with leadership that prioritizes local relationships and service. Their management team brings extensive banking experience—the President/CEO has 30+ years in community banking, and team members emphasize personal service and community development. They actively partner with local organizations like the Colorado Springs Philharmonic. Being independently owned rather than part of a larger corporate structure allows for localized decision-making.

As a traditional brick-and-mortar bank with limited online presence regarding specific loan terms, rates, or application details, prospective borrowers must contact them directly by phone (1-888-297-3416) or email (info@ppnb.com) to obtain loan terms. The website provides no information about APRs, loan amounts, credit requirements, or repayment terms, which limits transparency for online research. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pros: Independent bank owned locally since 1957 with nearly 70 years of community service
Personalized loan process emphasized for both car and personal loans
Three physical branch locations in Colorado Springs for in-person service
Leadership team with 30+ years banking experience focused on community development
Active community partnerships, including sponsorship of Colorado Springs Philharmonic
Multiple personal account types (Independence, Command, Universal) tailored to different needs
Offers both vehicle financing and general personal loans in one institution
cons: Website provides no specific loan terms, APR rates, loan amount ranges, or eligibility requirements
No online loan application available—requires phone/email contact to start process
Limited to three physical branch locations, restricting accessibility for wider Colorado Springs area
No information about credit score requirements, approval timeline, or funding speed
Website lacks details on personal loan purposes, maximum amounts, or repayment terms
best_for: Colorado Springs residents seeking personalized service from a locally-owned bank
Borrowers who prefer in-person banking relationships and community-focused institutions
Customers needing both vehicle financing and general personal loans from a single lender
Individuals who value the stability and reputation of a 70-year-old independent bank
diagnosis: Best for Colorado Springs residents seeking relationship-based personal or auto lending from an established independent bank. Main caveat: The bank's website contains virtually no specific loan terms, rates, or application details, requiring direct phone/email contact to obtain pricing and eligibility information—unsuitable for online self-service research or quick rate comparisons.
services: Personal loans for vacations and medical procedures
In-person banking at three branch locations
meta_description: Independent Colorado Springs bank established in 1957 offering car loans and banking services.
